videos.headline: Justice Ellison charges in for Indiana's first TD
videos.description: Justice Ellison powers into the end zone, giving Indiana its first touchdown against Northwestern.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Justice Ellison charges in for Indiana’s first TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Porter zips into the end zone to level with Indiana
videos.description: Cam Porter rushes in for Northwestern's first touchdown, tying the score at 7-7 against Indiana.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Porter zips into the end zone to level with Indiana) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Miles Cross leaps for Indiana TD catch
videos.description: Kurtis Rourke connects with Miles Cross, who makes a leaping catch in the end zone to score for Indiana.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Miles Cross leaps for Indiana TD catch) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ke'Shawn Williams extends Indiana's lead with TD catch
videos.description: Kurtis Rourke launches a dime to Ke'Shawn Williams to score a 13-yard touchdown, extending Indiana's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ke'Shawn Williams extends Indiana's lead with TD catch) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: A.J. Henning hauls in 38-yard TD for Northwestern
videos.description: Jack Lausch finds A.J. Henning who takes it 38 yards to the house for a Northwestern touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (A.J. Henning hauls in 38-yard TD for Northwestern) 2024/10/05 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ty Son Lawton pushes into end zone for Indiana TD
videos.description: Ty Son Lawton powers through to score for Indiana vs. Northwestern.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ty Son Lawton pushes into end zone for Indiana TD) 2024/10/05 ESHEET
